user: give me a high protein breakfast
assistant:
Title: High Protein Breakfast
Ingredients: 
- 1 cup nonfat yogurt (I use Dannon Light n Fit), 
- 1/4 cup skim milk, 
- 1/4 cup oat bran, 
- 1/4 cup wheat germ, 
- 1/2 scoop protein powder (I use vanilla), 
- 1 tablespoon peanut butter.
